name: DISABLE_WATER_LOOKUP
comment: Must be called every frame to take full effect.

name: GET_WATER_HEIGHT
comment: Checks against a global variable that is set by _SET_WORLD_WATER_TYPE. If that is set to one it will fail. Likely not the only issue but part of it.
lua:
-- 0xFCA8B23F28813F69 · build 1207
local x = 0.0
local y = 0.0
local z = 0.0
local result, height = GetWaterHeight(x, y, z)

name: TEST_VERTICAL_PROBE_AGAINST_ALL_WATER
comment:
Checks against a global variable that is set by _SET_WORLD_WATER_TYPE. If it's set to 1 (Guarma) it will fail.

See TEST_PROBE_AGAINST_ALL_WATER.
lua:
-- 0x2B3451FA1E3142E2 · build 1207
local x = 0.0
local y = 0.0
local z = 0.0
local flags = 0
local result, waterHeight = TestVerticalProbeAgainstAllWater(x, y, z, flags)

name: _0x09A1C7DFDCE54FBC

Called together with REMOVE_EXTRA_CALMING_QUAD in rcm_crackpot1 R* Script: p0 = 0
_REMOVE_*

name: _GET_WORLD_WATER_TYPE
research: Retourne un identifiant de zone/monde (0 = monde principal, 1 = Guarma). Role exact incertain. *(OCR - a verifier)*

name: _RESET_GUARMA_WATER_STATE
comment:
Only used in guama1 / guama3 R* Script
_REQUEST_* or _RESET_*

name: _SET_OCEAN_GUARMA_WATER_QUADRANT
comment: Only used in R* Script guama1 this native allows to modify the ocean water in the guarma island. wave direction accepts 0, 1 and 2 values.
lua:
-- 0xC63540AEF8384732 · build 1207
local wavesHeight = 0.0
local p1 = 0.0
local waveDirection = 0
local p3 = 0.0
local waveAmmount = 0.0
local p5 = 0.0
local waveSpeed = 0.0
local wavesStrength = 0.0
local ignoreHeight = 0
SetOceanGuarmaWaterQuadrant(wavesHeight, p1, waveDirection, p3, waveAmmount, p5, waveSpeed, wavesStrength, ignoreHeight)
